title: Dynamic Jump
description: Defines a dynamic type jump control that will change jump properties based on the speed modifier of the mob. Requires `minecraft:movement.skip` to be used.

fast_skip_data.title: Fast Skip Data
fast_skip_data.description:
The jump data used for the fast skip.

Values:
• Animation Duration: Duration of the jump animation.
• Distance Scale: The multiplier applied to horizontal velocity when jumping.
• Height: The force applied vertically when jumping.
• Jump Delay: Amount of ticks between sequential jumps.

regular_skip_data.title: Regular Skip Data
regular_skip_data.description:
The jump data used for the regular skip.

Values:
• Animation Duration: Duration of the jump animation.
• Distance Scale: The multiplier applied to horizontal velocity when jumping.
• Height: The force applied vertically when jumping.
• Jump Delay: Amount of ticks between sequential jumps.
